overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a decaying abandoned building. The character moves through a staff break room, a filthy bathroom with multiple tubs, a concrete stairwell, and dark corridors using a flashlight to navigate the oppressive atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned staff room with sinks and cabinets

events.description: character opens door and exits the break room into a dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking around the small room, examining the sinks and desk with flashlight

entered.detail: painted cinder block wall with peeling paint
white porcelain sink with silver faucets
tall green metal storage cabinet
cluttered wooden desk with papers and objects
single overhead fluorescent light

segments.scene_description: The character explores a small abandoned staff room with teal walls and a white sink. The room contains a green locker and cluttered wooden desk. After briefly examining the space, the character opens the door to exit at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: decayed public restroom with multiple bathtubs

events.description: enters decaying bathroom with white tiles and multiple filthy bathtubs
flashlight illuminates different areas revealing black mold and grime on walls
approaches bathtub with visible dark stains and debris

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark bathroom, shining flashlight on walls and bathtubs

entered.detail: grimy white ceramic tile wall covered in black mold
filthy white porcelain bathtub with dark stains
second bathtub against the back wall
tall metal floor lamp between bathtubs
decayed wooden table or bench

segments.scene_description: The character enters a decaying bathroom with white tiled walls covered in black mold. Multiple filthy bathtubs occupy the space, illuminated by the flashlight. The character explores the perimeter, examining the stained fixtures and debris before heading toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with metal security gates

events.description: exits bathroom and enters concrete stairwell with chain-link metal gates
ascends the stairs, turning at the landing to continue upward
passes under a red emergency light casting colored glow on concrete walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs, passing through metal gates on each floor landing

entered.detail: metal chain-link security gate blocking the stairwell
worn concrete stairs with metal handrails
red painted metal handrail attached to wall
red directional arrow sign painted on wall
wall-mounted light fixture illuminating the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bathroom into a stark concrete stairwell with chain-link security gates. Ascending the stairs, the character passes wall-mounted lights and red directional signs. The environment is utilitarian with graffiti on the walls and metal railings along the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with doors and bulletin boards

events.description: exits stairwell into long institutional corridor with doors and signs
enters darker, more decayed hallway with wooden boards covering walls
flashlight reveals bloodstains on floor and debris scattered around

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor, examining doors and signs, moving into darker areas

entered.detail: institutional painted wall with green wainscoting
closed wooden door with glass panel
cork bulletin board with papers attached
overhead fluorescent light fixture
wooden planks boarding up a doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long institutional corridor with doors and bulletin boards. The lighting shifts as the character moves into a darker, more decayed section with wooden barricades covering doorways. Bloodstains and debris become visible on the floor as the flashlight scans the increasingly ominous environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a decaying facility, transitioning from a cluttered staff area into an increasingly grim and bloodstained institutional wing. It begins inside a small staff room with teal walls and a wooden desk before the camera moves through a doorway into a mold-ridden bathroom filled with filthy bathtubs. As the character exits the bathroom, the environment shifts to a stark concrete stairwell where the camera ascends past chain-link gates and red directional signs. The scene then opens into a long institutional corridor with bulletin boards, which gradually descends into a darker, more decayed section. Finally, the flashlight reveals wooden barricades and bloodstains on the floor as the atmosphere becomes more ominous.
